body:
Plus a simple test with a plankton growth/death model similar to `examples/convecting_plankton.jl`.

TODO:
* [x] Add the interface to `HydrostaticFreeSurfaceModel`
* [x] Better interface for defining the biogeochemical source function
* [x] Better interface for automagically adding biogeochemical tracers?

With @jagoosw
title: Adds an interface for inserting biogeochemistry models into Oceananigans models
